product.name: CAR PASS Waterproof Universal Fit Car Floor Mats, Faux Leather Car Carpet Mats, Black Car Mats with Anti-Slip Nibbs Backing & Driver Heel Pad Fit for SUV,Vans,sedans, Trucks,Set of 4pcs(All Black)
features: Anti-Slip Design-Heavy Nibbed Backing To Keep The Mats Securely In Place. Offer Protection for Your Car's Interior and Safety Features for You.

STAIN RESISTANT- Easy To Install and Maintain.Waterproof Design and Leather Make Your Car Clean. Our All Weather Car Mats Are Easy To Clean with The Simply Spray of A Hose. Simply Spray Each Mat Clean of Dirt, Mud, Grit, and Grime Restoring The Mats Luster and Shine with Each Wash.

REFLASH YOUR CAR -Fashion and Sporty Color make your car so special and beautiful.Set of two front floor mats and two rear floor mats. Perfect size to fit most sedans, crossovers,SUVS,Trucks and Vans.
Dimensions - Shape and Size is Engineered to Fit Most Cars, Trucks, Vans and SUVs. Front (25.2"L x 17.3W) Rear (11.8"L x 17.3"W) - Please Make Sure to Check Measurements Before Installation.
